title: ProDec 18' x 12' Tarpaulin Waterproof Heavy Duty Waterproof Sheet, Double Laminated with Eyelets, Outdoor Furniture Cover, Caravan Cover Sheet, Camping Tarp, Ground Sheets for Camping
features: HEAVY DUTY: This waterproof tarpaulin is 100% weatherproof, waterproof and rot proof. The heavy duty plastic sheeting is mould resistant and washable using a jet washer or hand scrub, with or without detergent
QUALITY: The durable heavy duty tarpaulin is double laminated and made from tear and stretch-resistant polyethylene that will withstand even heavy rain and high winds
PRACTICALITY: Ideal as a waterproof cover for outdoor use, it features reinforced aluminium eyelets every metre for secure and effective lashing down and fixing with strong rope or twine

MULTI-PURPOSE: A wide variety of uses includes building and construction, caravan cover sheet, vehicle and boat waterproof cover, gazebo side panels, general storage, as a groundsheet, gazebo cover, car boot mat, removal blankets, trampoline cover, shed roof covering and outdoor table cover
description: ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating tools and accessories. Protect building work, vehicles, trailers, boats and more from the elements with this trade quality 18' x 12' (5.4m x 3.7m) tarpaulin. Made from double laminated tear- and stretch-resistant polyethylene, it is weatherproof, waterproof, rot proof and mould resistant, which also makes it suitable for use as a groundsheet for camping. To keep the tarpaulin safely lashed down against the worst weather there are reinforced aluminium eyelets every metre for secure fastening with strong rope or twine.
